languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."

languages.text: "Идира права. Имматериум здесь... словно приглушен. И, надо полагать, источник этого внезапного безмолвия отнюдь не свят".
"Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And we can only assume that the cause of this sudden silence is far from sacred."
languages.original_text: "Идира права. Имматериум здесь... словно приглушен. И, надо полагать, источник этого внезапного безмолвия отнюдь не свят".

traits.locale_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."
"Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."
"Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."
"Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And we can only assume that the cause of this sudden silence is far from sacred."

languages.text: 「イディラは正しい。この物質界の...静けさは、聖なるものによるものではないと推測される」
languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And the source of this tranquillity, we must assume, is not anything sacred."

traits.locale_text: 「イディラは正しい。この物質界の...静けさは、聖なるものによるものではないと推測される。」

languages.text: « Idira a raison. L'Immaterium est... assourdi par ici, et tout porte à croire que la cause de ce silence soudain n'a rien de sacré. »
languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And we can only assume that the cause of this sudden silence is far from sacred."

traits.locale_text: « Idira a raison. L'Immaterium est... assourdi par ici, et tout porte à croire que la cause de ce silence soudain n'a rien de sacré. »

languages.text: "Idira hat recht. Das Immaterium ... ist stumm hier. Und wir können nur vermuten, dass der Grund dieser plötzlichen Stille alles andere als heilig ist."
languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And we can only assume that the cause of this sudden silence is far from sacred."

traits.locale_text: "Idira hat recht. Das Immaterium ... ist stumm hier. Und wir können nur vermuten, dass der Grund dieser plötzlichen Stille alles andere als heilig ist."

languages.text: "İdira haklı. Buradaki Tindiyar... Suskun. Bu ani sessizliğin nedeninin kutsal olmaktan çok uzak olduğunu varsayabiliriz."
languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And we can only assume that the cause of this sudden silence is far from sacred."

traits.locale_text: "İdira haklı. Buradaki Tindiyar... Suskun. Bu ani sessizliğin nedeninin kutsal olmaktan çok uzak olduğunu varsayabiliriz."

languages.text: «Idira tiene razón. El Inmaterio aquí está... apagado. Podemos dar por hecho que el motivo tras este silencio dista mucho de ser sagrado».
languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And we can only assume that the cause of this sudden silence is far from sacred."

traits.locale_text: «Idira tiene razón. El Inmaterio aquí está... apagado. Podemos dar por hecho que el motivo tras este silencio dista mucho de ser sagrado».

languages.text: “伊迪拉说得对。这里的亚空间……被静默了。我们只能推断，这突如其来的寂静绝非神圣之物所致。”
languages.original_text: "Idira is right. The Immaterium here... is muted. And we can only assume that the cause of this sudden silence is far from sacred."

traits.locale_text: “伊迪拉说得对。这里的亚空间……被静默了。我们只能推断，这突如其来的寂静绝非神圣之物所致。”
